narrative:
Precinct Clay Township B (precinct in Scioto County) has 576 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
